phases.name: Foundation and Runtime Skeleton
phases.description: Establish Python/uv runtime baseline, FastAPI operational gateway, provider adapter integration, and sub-agent contract definitions.

tasks.name: Runtime Bootstrap and Configuration [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Implement application bootstrap, configuration loading, validation lifecycle, and baseline structured logging setup.

tasks.name: FastAPI Operational Gateway [CMP_API_FASTAPI_GATEWAY]
tasks.description: Implement liveness/readiness endpoints and foundational API module wiring for operational control paths.

tasks.name: Anthropic Provider Adapter [CMP_PROVIDER_LLM_ANTHROPIC_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Integrate Pydantic AI provider abstraction with Anthropic-first model configuration.

tasks.name: Sub-agent Contract Definitions [CMP_AGENT_SUBAGENT_COORDINATOR]
tasks.description: Define spawn request/result schemas, model allowlist policy fields, budget limits, and execution guardrails.

deliverables: FastAPI health and baseline operational API surface
Sub-agent spawning schema and policy definitions
success_criteria: Service starts with validated configuration and deterministic boot checks
Health endpoints provide stable liveness/readiness status
Baseline provider call path succeeds for smoke prompts
Sub-agent request schema validation rejects invalid payloads

phases.name: Telegram Channel and Multimodal Intake
phases.description: Implement Telegram integration, message normalization contracts, and text/attachment/voice ingress behavior.

tasks.name: Telegram Adapter Core [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Implement Telegram webhook/polling adapter, authorization allowlist checks, and outbound message responses.

tasks.name: Event Normalization Contracts [CMP_CORE_AGENT_ORCHESTRATOR]
tasks.description: Define normalized event schema used by orchestrator for all channel and scheduler input.

tasks.name: Attachment and Voice Intake [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Implement multimodal metadata extraction and fallback flows for unsupported payload details.

tasks.name: Channel Throttling and Retry [CMP_CHANNEL_TELEGRAM_ADAPTER]
tasks.description: Add channel request throttling, retry policy, and operational error telemetry for outbound delivery.

success_criteria: Allowlisted Telegram user requests are processed successfully
Text, attachments, and voice notes map to normalized event schema
Unauthorized users are blocked and audited
Outbound failures are retried according to policy

phases.name: Filesystem Memory System
phases.description: Implement markdown+frontmatter long-term memory with retrieval/write/consolidation policies.

tasks.name: Memory Schema and Storage Layout [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Define and enforce memory category schemas with deterministic file paths and metadata requirements.

tasks.name: Memory Retrieval Strategies [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement category-aware retrieval and context assembly strategies for response generation.

tasks.name: Memory Write and Dedup Policies [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement idempotent writes, confidence-aware updates, and duplicate detection behavior.

tasks.name: Consolidation Maintenance Jobs [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Implement periodic consolidation tasks to reduce drift and preserve memory relevance over time.

success_criteria: Memory persists and validates across restarts
Context retrieval returns relevant artifacts for active prompts
Deduplication reduces conflicting memory entries
Consolidation jobs complete with audit logs

phases.name: Capabilities, Skills, and Sub-agent Delegation
phases.description: Deliver manifest-driven extension runtime, first-party capability set, and safe sub-agent orchestration.

tasks.name: Manifest Registry Lifecycle [CMP_TOOL_RUNTIME_REGISTRY]
tasks.description: Implement manifest discovery, validation, runtime loading, and enable/disable lifecycle behavior.

tasks.name: First-party Capability Pack [CMP_SKILL_RUNTIME_ENGINE]
tasks.description: Deliver memory, web research, shell, calendar, GitHub CLI, and macOS Notes/Reminders integration capabilities and skill wrappers.

tasks.name: Capability and Execution Safety [CMP_TOOL_RUNTIME_REGISTRY]
tasks.description: Apply policy enforcement, allowlists, timeout controls, and side-effect auditing for capability execution.

tasks.name: Sub-agent Coordinator Runtime [CMP_AGENT_SUBAGENT_COORDINATOR]
tasks.description: Implement sub-agent spawn lifecycle with explicit model selection, budget limits, and concurrency controls.

tasks.name: Delegation Observability [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Implement parent-child trace correlation and audit logs for all delegated tasks.

deliverables: Sub-agent runtime path with model selection controls
success_criteria: Capabilities and skills load from manifests without runtime ambiguity
Policy violations are blocked and surfaced with actionable errors
Sub-agent spawn requests require explicit model_id and pass guardrails
Sub-agent budget/concurrency limits are enforced
Delegated task audit trails are queryable

phases.name: Scheduler and Reminder Execution
phases.description: Implement single-timezone scheduler, reminder lifecycle, and resilient execution behavior.

tasks.name: Scheduler Runtime Core [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement persisted scheduler runtime with one-off and recurring jobs in a single configured timezone.

tasks.name: Reminder Lifecycle APIs [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement create, list, update, and cancel reminder flows via orchestrator/API paths.

tasks.name: Retry and Missed-run Handling [CMP_AUTOMATION_SCHEDULER]
tasks.description: Implement bounded retries, missed-run compensation, and failure state transitions.

tasks.name: Scheduler Audit Trail [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Persist scheduler outcomes with consistent event schema and operational visibility.

deliverables: Scheduler runtime and persisted job state
success_criteria: Reminders trigger within configured lateness thresholds
Job state survives process restarts
Failed jobs are retried or marked failed by policy
Scheduler history is available for operational review

phases.name: Minimal Admin and Operational Hardening
phases.description: Deliver admin controls, memory browsing, capability toggles, backup/export routines, and tmux runbook validation.

tasks.name: Minimal Admin UI and API [CMP_ADMIN_MINIMAL_UI]
tasks.description: Implement health, memory, and runtime status dashboards with secure API bindings.

tasks.name: Memory Browser and Capability Toggles [CMP_API_FASTAPI_GATEWAY]
tasks.description: Expose admin controls for memory inspection and capability enable/disable operations with audit logging.

tasks.name: Backup and Export Workflows [CMP_MEMORY_FILESYSTEM_STORE]
tasks.description: Provide filesystem backup/export capabilities for memory and runtime audit artifacts.

tasks.name: tmux Runbook and Smoke Validation [CMP_OBSERVABILITY_LOGGING]
tasks.description: Document startup/restart/check procedures and execute critical smoke flow verification checklist.

deliverables: Minimal admin interface and secured API operations
Memory browsing and capability toggling controls
tmux deployment runbook and smoke checklist
success_criteria: Admin can inspect runtime health and key component state
Memory and capability operations are available with audit trails
Backup and restore process is repeatable
Critical user flows pass smoke checks after restart

notes: Tracker aligned with ASSISTANT_V1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN phases and dependencies.
All tasks include component IDs for traceability with architecture and technical specification docs.
Sub-agent spawning with explicit model selection is represented in phase 1 and phase 4 tasks.
Status values follow project documentation ruleset requirements.
Authoritative tracker for assistant_v1 scope is docs/assistant_v1/project_tracker.json; docs/project_tracker.json remains a root-level template/reference.
